name: Yamato Kogyo Co., Ltd.
summary: Yamato Kogyo Co., Ltd., through its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells steel products in Japan, the United States, South Korea, Thailand, the Kingdom of Bahrain, the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, Vietnam, and internationally. The company offers steel products and heavy-duty processing goods, railway track accessories, reinforcing bars, steel billets, and structural steel products. It is also involved in the transportation; medical waste treatment; and real estate leasing activities, as well as industrial waste refining; and material handling at ports. It also manufactures counterweights and storage tanks. The company was founded in 1944 and is headquartered in Himeji, Japan.
